notes.graph_build.enabled: Set to true to enable graph building
notes.graph_build.auto_start_after_forward: If true, graph build starts automatically after forward pipeline completes
notes.similarity_linking.cosine_threshold: Minimum cosine similarity (0-1) to create SIMILAR_TO edge
notes.knowledge_graph.enabled: Enable entity extraction and semantic relationships (requires spaCy)

requirements: Neo4j server running (Community or Enterprise Edition)
neo4j Python driver: pip install neo4j
For knowledge graph: pip install spacy && python -m spacy download en_core_web_sm
pgvector with embeddings already built (forward pipeline completed)
